name: JD - Fraud Detection - New Term Transactions

sections.markdown:
# Fraud Detection — New Beneficiary Transactions

This notebook simulates a first-party fraud detection pattern: identifying outbound transactions where the **beneficiary account has never been seen before** for that specific originating account.

The detection logic works in two steps:
1. Load the current **known beneficiary list** from the `banking_beneficiaries` lookup table (maintained by the *JD - DQL to Lookup* workflow).
2. Cross-check each incoming transaction against that list. Any transaction going to a beneficiary **not yet in the known list** is flagged as a *new beneficiary transaction* and surfaced as a potential fraud signal.

> **Data note:** Transactions in this notebook use a synthetic inline dataset for demonstration. In production, replace the `data ... record(...)` block with `fetch bizevents, from:now()-1h | filter event.type == "banking.transaction"`.

input.value:
data
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T08:15:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-001", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0001", beneficiary_account = "ACC-DE-042", amount = 1250.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T09:32:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-001", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0002", beneficiary_account = "ACC-FR-018", amount = 340.50, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T10:05:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-001", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0003", beneficiary_account = "ACC-DE-042", amount = 980.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "PAYMENT", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T11:47:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-001", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0004", beneficiary_account = "ACC-GB-007", amount = 2100.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T08:22:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-002", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0005", beneficiary_account = "ACC-ES-091", amount = 450.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "DIRECT_DEBIT", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T09:10:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-002", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0006", beneficiary_account = "ACC-NL-005", amount = 875.25, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T13:55:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-002", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0007", beneficiary_account = "ACC-ES-091", amount = 220.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "DIRECT_DEBIT", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T14:30:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-002", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0008", beneficiary_account = "ACC-BE-019", amount = 1600.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "FAILED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T07:58:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-003", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0009", beneficiary_account = "ACC-IT-033", amount = 3200.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T10:44:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-003", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0010", beneficiary_account = "ACC-NL-001", amount = 500.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "PAYMENT", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T12:20:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-003", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0011", beneficiary_account = "ACC-BE-012", amount = 760.80, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T15:05:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-003", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0012", beneficiary_account = "ACC-IT-033", amount = 4100.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T09:00:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-004", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0013", beneficiary_account = "ACC-NL-001", amount = 190.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "PAYMENT", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T11:30:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-004", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0014", beneficiary_account = "ACC-NL-002", amount = 3350.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T08:05:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-US-010", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0015", beneficiary_account = "ACC-NL-001", amount = 5000.00, currency = "USD", transaction_type = "WIRE_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T08:40:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-US-010", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0016", beneficiary_account = "ACC-DE-042", amount = 7800.00, currency = "USD", transaction_type = "WIRE_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T10:15:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-US-010", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0017", beneficiary_account = "ACC-FR-018", amount = 1100.00, currency = "USD", transaction_type = "WIRE_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T16:00:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-US-010", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0018", beneficiary_account = "ACC-GB-007", amount = 9200.00, currency = "USD", transaction_type = "WIRE_TRANSFER", status = "PENDING")
| filter status == "COMPLETED"
| fields timestamp, account_id, transaction_id, beneficiary_account, amount, currency, transaction_type
| sort timestamp asc

sections.markdown:
## Step 1 — Known Beneficiary Baseline

The lookup table `banking_beneficiaries` is maintained by the *JD - DQL to Lookup* workflow. It holds the **historical known beneficiaries** per account — i.e., every beneficiary the account has successfully sent funds to in prior periods.

The query below shows the current state of the lookup. Each row represents one account and its full known beneficiary list.

input.value:
load "/lookups/banking_beneficiaries"
| fields account_id, beneficiaries, transaction_count, total_outflow
| sort account_id asc

sections.markdown:
## Step 2 — New Term Detection

Each incoming transaction is joined against the lookup using `account_id` as the key. A transaction is flagged as **new term** if either:

- The originating `account_id` has **no entry at all** in the lookup (brand-new account, no history) → `isNull(lookup.beneficiaries)`
- The `beneficiary_account` is **not present** in the account's known beneficiary array → `not(in(beneficiary_account, lookup.beneficiaries))`

These are the transactions that would trigger a fraud review or a real-time alert in production.

The data block below extends the base dataset with three new-term transactions to demonstrate alerts firing.
These beneficiaries are not present in the current lookup state:
- `TXN-20250722-0001` — `ACC-NL-001` → `ACC-TR-088` (known account, **first time** sending to Turkey)
- `TXN-20250722-0002` — `ACC-NL-002` → `ACC-RO-044` (known account, **first time** sending to Romania)
- `TXN-20250722-0003` — `ACC-XX-NEW` → `ACC-DE-042` (account exists in lookup but `ACC-DE-042` is not in its known list)

> The `lookup` command enriches each row using `account_id` as the join key. Matched fields are prefixed with `lookup.` — so the beneficiary array is `lookup.beneficiaries`, not `beneficiaries`.

input.value:
data
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T08:15:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-001", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0001", beneficiary_account = "ACC-DE-042", amount = 1250.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T09:32:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-001", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0002", beneficiary_account = "ACC-FR-018", amount = 340.50, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T10:05:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-001", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0003", beneficiary_account = "ACC-DE-042", amount = 980.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "PAYMENT", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T11:47:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-001", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0004", beneficiary_account = "ACC-GB-007", amount = 2100.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T08:22:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-002", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0005", beneficiary_account = "ACC-ES-091", amount = 450.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "DIRECT_DEBIT", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T09:10:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-002", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0006", beneficiary_account = "ACC-NL-005", amount = 875.25, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T13:55:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-002", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0007", beneficiary_account = "ACC-ES-091", amount = 220.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "DIRECT_DEBIT", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T14:30:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-002", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0008", beneficiary_account = "ACC-BE-019", amount = 1600.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "FAILED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T07:58:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-003", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0009", beneficiary_account = "ACC-IT-033", amount = 3200.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T10:44:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-003", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0010", beneficiary_account = "ACC-NL-001", amount = 500.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "PAYMENT", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T12:20:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-003", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0011", beneficiary_account = "ACC-BE-012", amount = 760.80, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T15:05:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-003", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0012", beneficiary_account = "ACC-IT-033", amount = 4100.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T09:00:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-004", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0013", beneficiary_account = "ACC-NL-001", amount = 190.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "PAYMENT", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T11:30:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-004", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0014", beneficiary_account = "ACC-NL-002", amount = 3350.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T08:05:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-US-010", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0015", beneficiary_account = "ACC-NL-001", amount = 5000.00, currency = "USD", transaction_type = "WIRE_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T08:40:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-US-010", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0016", beneficiary_account = "ACC-DE-042", amount = 7800.00, currency = "USD", transaction_type = "WIRE_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T10:15:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-US-010", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0017", beneficiary_account = "ACC-FR-018", amount = 1100.00, currency = "USD", transaction_type = "WIRE_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-21T16:00:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-US-010", transaction_id = "TXN-20250721-0018", beneficiary_account = "ACC-GB-007", amount = 9200.00, currency = "USD", transaction_type = "WIRE_TRANSFER", status = "PENDING"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-22T09:14:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-001", transaction_id = "TXN-20250722-0001", beneficiary_account = "ACC-TR-088", amount = 8900.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "WIRE_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-22T10:31:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-NL-002", transaction_id = "TXN-20250722-0002", beneficiary_account = "ACC-RO-044", amount = 4200.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED"),
    record(timestamp = toTimestamp("2025-07-22T11:05:00.000000000+02:00"), account_id = "ACC-XX-NEW", transaction_id = "TXN-20250722-0003", beneficiary_account = "ACC-DE-042", amount = 6750.00, currency = "EUR", transaction_type = "CREDIT_TRANSFER", status = "COMPLETED")
| filter status == "COMPLETED"
| lookup [load "/lookups/banking_beneficiaries"], sourceField:account_id, lookupField:account_id
| fieldsAdd is_new_beneficiary = isNull(lookup.beneficiaries) or not(in(beneficiary_account, lookup.beneficiaries))
| filter is_new_beneficiary == true
| fields timestamp, account_id, transaction_id, beneficiary_account, amount, currency, transaction_type
| sort timestamp asc
